Should flag

Side Tab Accent

A thick colored border on one side of a rounded card.

Low Contrast Body

Grey text on white that fails WCAG AA contrast.

Gradient Clipped Heading

A heading painted with a purple-to-pink gradient clipped to the text.

Should pass

Full Border Card

An even border on all four sides, not a one-sided accent.

Good Contrast Body

Near-black text on white, comfortably above AA.

Solid Color Heading

A large heading in a single solid ink color, no gradient fill.
